description: S46 write-half (#5, codex-vetted 2026-05-30): drive auto-accept-friend via l3_set_setting and prove it round-trips through l3_dump_state.autoAcceptFriends (false→true→false). Soft precondition (starts false) catches a dirty fixture; ends restored to the seeded default false so the fixture self-cleans even if interrupted. autoAcceptFriends is Prefs-only (no native counterpart). Hermetic — no echo peer.
